steps.title: Form the quadratic
steps.content:
Square both sides and move all terms to one side.
$$
45p+144=p^2
$$
$$
p^2-45p-144=0
$$

steps.title: Use the valid root
steps.content: Factor the quadratic. $$ (p-48)(p+3)=0 $$ The root $p=-3$ is invalid because a square root output cannot be negative. The answer is 48.
